kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Either Cooper goes with 9 coins or someone in the Ironmongers' Guild goes with Millpond.
The Fletcher's levy is between Matilda and the artisan in Millpond.
Potter, 9 coins, and 15 coins go with Matilda, Highrow, and Riverside, in some order.
Either Blacksmith goes with Edmund or Matilda goes with Tanner.
Rowan goes with exactly two of Potter, Highrow, and 15 coins.
Edmund goes with at least two of Mason, Southgate, and 5 coins.
Exactly two of Edmund, the artisan with 11 coins, the artisan with 13 coins, and the artisan with 15 coins belong to the Hill Ward.
More members of the Hill Ward are in the Ironmongers' Guild than members of the Market Ward.
Between Rowan and Wulfric, one goes with Eastcheap and the other with Highrow.
Either Beatrix goes with 13 coins, or Blacksmith goes with Bridgegate — but not both.
